metadata.analysis: Decomposed phase uniformity analysis for L_DH
metadata.description: Phase uniformity analysis decomposed by number-theoretic class

hypothesis.statement: Phase non-uniformity is primarily driven by semiprimes
hypothesis.finding: Phase non-uniformity increases monotonically with the number of distinct prime factors

prime_squares.note: All terms have a_n = 0 due to μ(n) = 0 (not squarefree)

other_nonsquarefree.note: All terms have a_n = 0 due to μ(n) = 0 (not squarefree)

key_findings: Only squarefree numbers contribute to L_DH (μ(n) ≠ 0)
Phase non-uniformity increases monotonically with number of prime factors
All squarefree classes show significant non-uniformity (p < 0.05)
